3290320.name: F.R.A.G.G.
3290320.description:
NEXT GENERATION ARENA COMBAT

F.R.A.G.G. is an Arena FPS that takes the heart-pounding action of classic Arena Shooters and cranks it up to max with next-generation visuals powered by Unreal Engine 5. If you enjoy fast paced, intense, competitive FPS action, F.R.A.G.G. is for you.

F.R.A.G.G. features intense multiplayer combat across beautifully crafted arenas where every move counts, while your ears are blasted by out an out of this world original soundtrack. Whether you're dodging rockets in tight corridors or sniping from afar, F.R.A.G.G.'s stunning graphics and audio pull you straight into the action.

F.R.A.G.G. strikes the perfect balance between casual fun and fulfilling veteran competitive action. With smooth, responsive controls, fluid movement, and that classic arena-shooter feel, but with a fresh, modern edge, F.R.A.G.G. bridges the gap between boomer-shooter classic AFPS and modern competitive gameplay.

Features:

  • Fast, skill-based combat without a constantly changing 'Meta'

  • Next-generation graphics taking advantage of the power of Unreal Engine 5

  • Arena maps designed for that sweetspot between strategy and hardcore action

  • Competitive singleplayer and multiplayer game modes from the classics like Deathmatch to modern modes like Battle Royale (With an Arena twist!)

Bottom line: If you're ready to test your skills and dominate the arena, F.R.A.G.G. is where you’ll prove it.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
